title: Hotel California
meaning_summary: This song holds value through a recognizable core riff or chorus, strong emotional payoff, and steady replay.
revenue_drivers: Classic replay value and catalog streaming keep major rock songs relevant.
Cultural familiarity supports long-tail listener demand.
Sync placements and live-culture recognition help extend the song's revenue life.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate models classic-rock streaming, album halo, radio recurrence, and writer-side participation.

ownership.master_owner: Major-label catalog master with band-side royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears tied to Eagles songwriter participation and publisher administration
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific sale adjustment is modeled
ownership.notes: Modeled annual range based on current catalog behavior.
